matched.detector: will you now or in the future require any immigration related support or sponsorship from hinge health? this could include support (such as j-1, f-1 cpt letter or stem opt training plan), visa sponsorship for employment (h-1b, h-1b1, e-3, o-1, or tn), and/or any ead holders that will need longer term employment authorization (temporary work visa or permanent residency). by selecting this option, you certify that this information provided regarding your sponsorship needs is true and accurate. providing false or misleading information may result in the withdrawal of a job application or termination of employment.

This could include support (such as J-1, F-1 CPT letter or STEM OPT Training Plan), visa sponsorship for employment (H-1B, H-1B1, E-3, O-1, or TN), and/or any EAD holders that will need longer term employment authorization (temporary work visa or permanent residency). By selecting this option, you certify that this information provided regarding your sponsorship needs is true and accurate. Providing false or misleading information may result in the withdrawal of a job application or termination of employment.
